name: Ryler Table Lamp - 19 Inch Height - TBL4539 - Black - Safavieh
description:
Elevate your space with the Ryler 19 inch black iron table lamp. This sleek and contemporary piece combines modern design with functionality. Crafted from sturdy metal, it boasts a sophisticated black finish that complements any decor. The minimalist silhouette and clean lines make it a versatile addition to your living room, bedroom, or office.

The Ryler table lamp provides ample lighting for reading or working while adding a touch of elegance. Its compact size makes it ideal for a bedside table or a desk, providing focused illumination without overwhelming the space. Easy to operate and maintain, this lamp blends seamlessly with a variety of aesthetics. Transform your environment with the Ryler black iron table lamp and enjoy its stylish presence in your home.
